item.title: STRP x ULTRA x BATTERY [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: STRP x ULTRA x BATTERY [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: crankv2
item.itunes:summary:
STRP x ULTRA x BATTERY
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
[color=#FF9800][size=5]STRPxULTRAxBATTERY[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=4]Unleash Your Device's True Potential[/size][/color]

[color=#607D8B][size=3]It's Not Just a Battery Saver, It's a [color=#FF5722]Powerhouse![/color][/size][/color]

[color=#263238][size=3]Get ready to experience the ultimate in battery management and device optimization with [color=#FF5722]STRPxULTRAxBATTERY[/color]. This powerful module empowers your device to its fullest potential, enhancing both battery life and performance.[/size][/color]

[color=#263238][size=3]Key Features:[/size][/color]

[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Real-time battery status monitoring[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Enable Battery Profile when battery falls below [color=#FF5722]20%[/color] (not charging)[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Disable Battery Profile when battery is charging below [color=#FF5722]20%[/color][/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ No action taken when battery is above [color=#FF5722]20%[/color] or not charging[/size][/color]

[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Enhanced Power App Management[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Freeze or force close power-hungry apps[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ User-defined resource thresholds and app types[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Displays process [color=#FF5722]PID[/color] and numbers before action[/size][/color]

[color=#009688][size=3]✓ CPU Governor Management (Ultra Battery Profile)[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Backs up current CPU governor settings when enabling the profile[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Restores previous governor settings when turning off the profile[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Selects the most power-efficient governor for better battery life[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Fallback to a general governor when specific governors are unavailable[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Comprehensive logging in "[color=#FF5722]Ultra Battery Profile Debug Log[/color]"[/size][/color]

[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Dynamic Voltage and Frequency Scaling ([color=#FF5722]DVFS[/color]) Prevention[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Prevents dynamic changes to CPU frequencies and governors during Ultra Battery mode[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Maximizes power efficiency by locking CPU settings[/size][/color]

[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Main Menu Enhancements[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Redesigned for improved readability[/size][/color]

[color=#009688][size=3]Reworked Features:[/size][/color]

[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Battery Saver Mode Toggle[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Force-Doze Toggle[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Screen Timeout Adjustment[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Adaptive Brightness Toggle[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Wakelock Timeout Adjustment[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Auto-Sync Toggle[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Auto-Sleep Timeout Adjustment[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Auto-Sleep Conditions Adjustment[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Display Sleep Timeout Adjustment[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Wake on Charge Toggle[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ WiFi Scan Interval Adjustment[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Ultra Battery Profile Enhancements[/size][/color]

[color=#263238][size=3]Other Improvements:[/size][/color]

[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Complete rework of the battery-saving script[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Enhanced .log file storage in module directory[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ New power-saving tweaks[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Removed Miui blur issues[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Fine-tuned core tweaks for maximum battery gains[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Enable or disable profiles on boot from the menu[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Reworked Quick command usage with "[color=#FF5722]SUB -h[/color]" ([color=#FF5722]HELP[/color]) menu[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Help menu provides device information for troubleshooting[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Bug fixes and performance optimizations[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Optimized CPU performance for better battery life[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Enhanced memory management for improved efficiency[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Reduced background processes for lower resource usage[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Streamlined system processes to conserve battery[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Fine-tuned I/O scheduler settings for power efficiency[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Improved network settings for reduced power consumption[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Enhanced GPU management for lower energy usage[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Tweaked kernel parameters for maximum battery backup[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Reduced system log generation for lower CPU usage[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Implemented idle preferences for system responsiveness[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Enhanced background task handling for improved efficiency[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Periodically checks and manages the log file to prevent excessive growth[/size][/color]

[color=#263238][size=3]Developer: [color=#FF5722]@CRANKV2[/color][/size][/color]
[color=#263238][size=3]Group: [color=#FF5722]AndroidRootModulesCommunity[/color][/size][/color]

[color=#263238][size=3]Join our community and unlock the true potential of your device with [color=#FF5722]STRPxULTRAxBATTERY[/color]![/size][/color]
[read more]
item.description:
STRP x ULTRA x BATTERY
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
[color=#FF9800][size=5]STRPxULTRAxBATTERY[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=4]Unleash Your Device's True Potential[/size][/color]

[color=#607D8B][size=3]It's Not Just a Battery Saver, It's a [color=#FF5722]Powerhouse![/color][/size][/color]

[color=#263238][size=3]Get ready to experience the ultimate in battery management and device optimization with [color=#FF5722]STRPxULTRAxBATTERY[/color]. This powerful module empowers your device to its fullest potential, enhancing both battery life and performance.[/size][/color]

[color=#263238][size=3]Key Features:[/size][/color]

[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Real-time battery status monitoring[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Enable Battery Profile when battery falls below [color=#FF5722]20%[/color] (not charging)[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Disable Battery Profile when battery is charging below [color=#FF5722]20%[/color][/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ No action taken when battery is above [color=#FF5722]20%[/color] or not charging[/size][/color]

[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Enhanced Power App Management[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Freeze or force close power-hungry apps[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ User-defined resource thresholds and app types[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Displays process [color=#FF5722]PID[/color] and numbers before action[/size][/color]

[color=#009688][size=3]✓ CPU Governor Management (Ultra Battery Profile)[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Backs up current CPU governor settings when enabling the profile[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Restores previous governor settings when turning off the profile[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Selects the most power-efficient governor for better battery life[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Fallback to a general governor when specific governors are unavailable[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Comprehensive logging in "[color=#FF5722]Ultra Battery Profile Debug Log[/color]"[/size][/color]

[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Dynamic Voltage and Frequency Scaling ([color=#FF5722]DVFS[/color]) Prevention[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Prevents dynamic changes to CPU frequencies and governors during Ultra Battery mode[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Maximizes power efficiency by locking CPU settings[/size][/color]

[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Main Menu Enhancements[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Redesigned for improved readability[/size][/color]

[color=#009688][size=3]Reworked Features:[/size][/color]

[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Battery Saver Mode Toggle[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Force-Doze Toggle[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Screen Timeout Adjustment[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Adaptive Brightness Toggle[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Wakelock Timeout Adjustment[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Auto-Sync Toggle[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Auto-Sleep Timeout Adjustment[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Auto-Sleep Conditions Adjustment[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Display Sleep Timeout Adjustment[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Wake on Charge Toggle[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ WiFi Scan Interval Adjustment[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Ultra Battery Profile Enhancements[/size][/color]

[color=#263238][size=3]Other Improvements:[/size][/color]

[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Complete rework of the battery-saving script[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Enhanced .log file storage in module directory[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ New power-saving tweaks[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Removed Miui blur issues[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Fine-tuned core tweaks for maximum battery gains[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Enable or disable profiles on boot from the menu[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Reworked Quick command usage with "[color=#FF5722]SUB -h[/color]" ([color=#FF5722]HELP[/color]) menu[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Help menu provides device information for troubleshooting[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Bug fixes and performance optimizations[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Optimized CPU performance for better battery life[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Enhanced memory management for improved efficiency[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Reduced background processes for lower resource usage[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Streamlined system processes to conserve battery[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Fine-tuned I/O scheduler settings for power efficiency[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Improved network settings for reduced power consumption[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Enhanced GPU management for lower energy usage[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Tweaked kernel parameters for maximum battery backup[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Reduced system log generation for lower CPU usage[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Implemented idle preferences for system responsiveness[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Enhanced background task handling for improved efficiency[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Periodically checks and manages the log file to prevent excessive growth[/size][/color]

[color=#263238][size=3]Developer: [color=#FF5722]@CRANKV2[/color][/size][/color]
[color=#263238][size=3]Group: [color=#FF5722]AndroidRootModulesCommunity[/color][/size][/color]

[color=#263238][size=3]Join our community and unlock the true potential of your device with [color=#FF5722]STRPxULTRAxBATTERY[/color]![/size][/color]
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
STRP x ULTRA x BATTERY
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
[color=#FF9800][size=5]STRPxULTRAxBATTERY[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=4]Unleash Your Device's True Potential[/size][/color]

[color=#607D8B][size=3]It's Not Just a Battery Saver, It's a [color=#FF5722]Powerhouse![/color][/size][/color]

[color=#263238][size=3]Get ready to experience the ultimate in battery management and device optimization with [color=#FF5722]STRPxULTRAxBATTERY[/color]. This powerful module empowers your device to its fullest potential, enhancing both battery life and performance.[/size][/color]

[color=#263238][size=3]Key Features:[/size][/color]

[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Real-time battery status monitoring[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Enable Battery Profile when battery falls below [color=#FF5722]20%[/color] (not charging)[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Disable Battery Profile when battery is charging below [color=#FF5722]20%[/color][/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ No action taken when battery is above [color=#FF5722]20%[/color] or not charging[/size][/color]

[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Enhanced Power App Management[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Freeze or force close power-hungry apps[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ User-defined resource thresholds and app types[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Displays process [color=#FF5722]PID[/color] and numbers before action[/size][/color]

[color=#009688][size=3]✓ CPU Governor Management (Ultra Battery Profile)[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Backs up current CPU governor settings when enabling the profile[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Restores previous governor settings when turning off the profile[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Selects the most power-efficient governor for better battery life[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Fallback to a general governor when specific governors are unavailable[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Comprehensive logging in "[color=#FF5722]Ultra Battery Profile Debug Log[/color]"[/size][/color]

[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Dynamic Voltage and Frequency Scaling ([color=#FF5722]DVFS[/color]) Prevention[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Prevents dynamic changes to CPU frequencies and governors during Ultra Battery mode[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Maximizes power efficiency by locking CPU settings[/size][/color]

[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Main Menu Enhancements[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Redesigned for improved readability[/size][/color]

[color=#009688][size=3]Reworked Features:[/size][/color]

[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Battery Saver Mode Toggle[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Force-Doze Toggle[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Screen Timeout Adjustment[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Adaptive Brightness Toggle[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Wakelock Timeout Adjustment[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Auto-Sync Toggle[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Auto-Sleep Timeout Adjustment[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Auto-Sleep Conditions Adjustment[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Display Sleep Timeout Adjustment[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Wake on Charge Toggle[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ WiFi Scan Interval Adjustment[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Ultra Battery Profile Enhancements[/size][/color]

[color=#263238][size=3]Other Improvements:[/size][/color]

[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Complete rework of the battery-saving script[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Enhanced .log file storage in module directory[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ New power-saving tweaks[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Removed Miui blur issues[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Fine-tuned core tweaks for maximum battery gains[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Enable or disable profiles on boot from the menu[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Reworked Quick command usage with "[color=#FF5722]SUB -h[/color]" ([color=#FF5722]HELP[/color]) menu[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Help menu provides device information for troubleshooting[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Bug fixes and performance optimizations[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Optimized CPU performance for better battery life[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Enhanced memory management for improved efficiency[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Reduced background processes for lower resource usage[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Streamlined system processes to conserve battery[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Fine-tuned I/O scheduler settings for power efficiency[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Improved network settings for reduced power consumption[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Enhanced GPU management for lower energy usage[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Tweaked kernel parameters for maximum battery backup[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Reduced system log generation for lower CPU usage[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Implemented idle preferences for system responsiveness[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Enhanced background task handling for improved efficiency[/size][/color]
[color=#009688][size=3]✓ Periodically checks and manages the log file to prevent excessive growth[/size][/color]

[color=#263238][size=3]Developer: [color=#FF5722]@CRANKV2[/color][/size][/color]
[color=#263238][size=3]Group: [color=#FF5722]AndroidRootModulesCommunity[/color][/size][/color]

[color=#263238][size=3]Join our community and unlock the true potential of your device with [color=#FF5722]STRPxULTRAxBATTERY[/color]![/size][/color]

item.itunes:author: meoify

(Virtualization)

(Virtualization)

item.content:encoded:
Project Dialer
(Virtualization)
Project Dialer For all devices.

[read more]

item.title: SSH-MITM - ssh audits made simple [Security]
item.itunes:title: SSH-MITM - ssh audits made simple [Security]
item.itunes:author: ssh-mitm
item.itunes:summary:
SSH-MITM - ssh audits made simple
(Security)
ssh man-in-the-middle (ssh-mitm) server for security audits supporting publickey authentication, session hijacking and file manipulation
[size=150][b]Features[/b][/size]
[list][*]Hijacking and logging of terminal sessions[/*][*]publickey authentication[/*][*]SCP and SFTP (store, replace, inject files)[/*][*]Agent Forwarding[/*][*]Port Forwarding[/*][*]Check and test clients against known vulnerabilities[/*][*]Plugin support[/*][/list]

[size=150][b]Connect to the network[/b][/size]

To start an intercepting mitm-ssh server on Port 10022, all you have to do is run a single command.
[code single]$ ./ssh-mitm-x86_64.AppImage server --remote-host 192.168.0.x[/code]
Now let's try to connect to the ssh-mitm server.
[code single]$ ssh -p 10022 user@proxyserver[/code]
You will see the credentials in the log output.
[code]2021-01-01 11:38:26,098 [INFO] Client connection established with parameters:
Remote Address: 192.168.0.x
Port: 22
Username: user
Password: supersecret
Key: None
Agent: None[/code]

[size=150][b]Hijack SSH sessions[/b][/size]

When a client connects, ssh-mitm starts a new server, which is used for session hijacking.
[code single][INFO] created injector shell on port 34463[/code]
To hijack this session, you can use your favorite ssh client. All you have to do is to connect to the hijacked session.
[code single]$ ssh -p 34463 127.0.0.1[/code]

[b]Full Documentation:[/b] [url=https://docs.ssh-mitm.at]https://docs.ssh-mitm.at[/url]
[read more]
item.description:
SSH-MITM - ssh audits made simple
(Security)
ssh man-in-the-middle (ssh-mitm) server for security audits supporting publickey authentication, session hijacking and file manipulation
[size=150][b]Features[/b][/size]
[list][*]Hijacking and logging of terminal sessions[/*][*]publickey authentication[/*][*]SCP and SFTP (store, replace, inject files)[/*][*]Agent Forwarding[/*][*]Port Forwarding[/*][*]Check and test clients against known vulnerabilities[/*][*]Plugin support[/*][/list]

[size=150][b]Connect to the network[/b][/size]

To start an intercepting mitm-ssh server on Port 10022, all you have to do is run a single command.
[code single]$ ./ssh-mitm-x86_64.AppImage server --remote-host 192.168.0.x[/code]
Now let's try to connect to the ssh-mitm server.
[code single]$ ssh -p 10022 user@proxyserver[/code]
You will see the credentials in the log output.
[code]2021-01-01 11:38:26,098 [INFO] Client connection established with parameters:
Remote Address: 192.168.0.x
Port: 22
Username: user
Password: supersecret
Key: None
Agent: None[/code]

[size=150][b]Hijack SSH sessions[/b][/size]

When a client connects, ssh-mitm starts a new server, which is used for session hijacking.
[code single][INFO] created injector shell on port 34463[/code]
To hijack this session, you can use your favorite ssh client. All you have to do is to connect to the hijacked session.
[code single]$ ssh -p 34463 127.0.0.1[/code]

[b]Full Documentation:[/b] [url=https://docs.ssh-mitm.at]https://docs.ssh-mitm.at[/url]
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
SSH-MITM - ssh audits made simple
(Security)
ssh man-in-the-middle (ssh-mitm) server for security audits supporting publickey authentication, session hijacking and file manipulation
[size=150][b]Features[/b][/size]
[list][*]Hijacking and logging of terminal sessions[/*][*]publickey authentication[/*][*]SCP and SFTP (store, replace, inject files)[/*][*]Agent Forwarding[/*][*]Port Forwarding[/*][*]Check and test clients against known vulnerabilities[/*][*]Plugin support[/*][/list]

[size=150][b]Connect to the network[/b][/size]

To start an intercepting mitm-ssh server on Port 10022, all you have to do is run a single command.
[code single]$ ./ssh-mitm-x86_64.AppImage server --remote-host 192.168.0.x[/code]
Now let's try to connect to the ssh-mitm server.
[code single]$ ssh -p 10022 user@proxyserver[/code]
You will see the credentials in the log output.
[code]2021-01-01 11:38:26,098 [INFO] Client connection established with parameters:
Remote Address: 192.168.0.x
Port: 22
Username: user
Password: supersecret
Key: None
Agent: None[/code]

[size=150][b]Hijack SSH sessions[/b][/size]

When a client connects, ssh-mitm starts a new server, which is used for session hijacking.
[code single][INFO] created injector shell on port 34463[/code]
To hijack this session, you can use your favorite ssh client. All you have to do is to connect to the hijacked session.
[code single]$ ssh -p 34463 127.0.0.1[/code]

[b]Full Documentation:[/b] [url=https://docs.ssh-mitm.at]https://docs.ssh-mitm.at[/url]
[read more]

item.title: Advanced Youtube Client - AYC [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Advanced Youtube Client - AYC [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: adithyassekhar
item.itunes:summary:
Advanced Youtube Client - AYC
(Utilities)
Github: https://github.com/adithya-s-sekhar/advanced-youtube-client-ayc
Opencode: https://www.opencode.net/adithyassekhar/advanced-youtube-client-ayc (This is a WIP importing from Github)
Test out latest featues and bug fixes before everyone: Test builds available on telegram https://t.me/s/ayc_news

Advanced Youtube Client - AYC v4.18 - 03/Nov/2023

What's new?
[4.18]
- Fixed: Shortcuts weren't being made or broken when AYC is in a path with spaces.
- Fixed: Reset in folder settings were resetting to an old path.
- Added: Custom quality selectors for youtube downloads.
- Code cleanups.
- UI Fixes.

AYC is a highly responsive, no nonsense, easy to use, fast video downloader from the text based era.

Features
- Supports Youtube, Reddit, Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, Twitch, Dailymotion, Vimeo and 100s of other websites that yt-dlp supports.
- Automatically saves video chapters, thumbnails, subtitles (User configurable).
- Supports downloading playlists, channels, keyword topics on multiple websites.
- Multithreaded downloads using aria2c to fully utilize the available bandwidth (User configurable).
- Batch mode can create jobs, save urls to them and download, resume, edit, delete.
- Extremely light and instantly responding text based ui.
- Easily editable batch script.
- Compatible with Windows 7 SP1/8/8.1/10/11 (32/64-bit).
- Downloads only. Does not convert to other formats. All formats are given by the website.
- Except for audio. Along with untouched M4A and OPUS audio straight from youtube, there is also a 128k CBR MP3 option.
- Everything is designed to help create muscle memory.

Installation
Note: Windows Defender will show a one-time warning before you try to start a batch file downloaded from the internet. You need to click More info and click Run Anyway for it to go away.

1. Download the latest AYC release from here.
2. Extract the ayc folder inside to anywhere on your computer (eg: C:\ayc). Do not extract inside Program Files.
3. Open AYClient.bat and follow the on screen instructions.

When you're done there'll be a shortcut created in ayc folder, on the desktop and in start menu. Open it to start using AYC.
[read more]

AYC is a highly responsive, no nonsense, easy to use, fast video downloader from the text based era.

- Supports Youtube, Reddit, Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, Twitch, Dailymotion, Vimeo and 100s of other websites that yt-dlp supports.
- Automatically saves video chapters, thumbnails, subtitles (User configurable).
- Supports downloading playlists, channels, keyword topics on multiple websites.
- Multithreaded downloads using aria2c to fully utilize the available bandwidth (User configurable).
- Batch mode can create jobs, save urls to them and download, resume, edit, delete.
- Extremely light and instantly responding text based ui.
- Easily editable batch script.
- Compatible with Windows 7 SP1/8/8.1/10/11 (32/64-bit).
- Downloads only. Does not convert to other formats. All formats are given by the website.
- Except for audio. Along with untouched M4A and OPUS audio straight from youtube, there is also a 128k CBR MP3 option.
- Everything is designed to help create muscle memory.

Installation
Note: Windows Defender will show a one-time warning before you try to start a batch file downloaded from the internet. You need to click More info and click Run Anyway for it to go away.

1. Download the latest AYC release from here.
2. Extract the ayc folder inside to anywhere on your computer (eg: C:\ayc). Do not extract inside Program Files.
3. Open AYClient.bat and follow the on screen instructions.

When you're done there'll be a shortcut created in ayc folder, on the desktop and in start menu. Open it to start using AYC.
[read more]

Advanced Youtube Client - AYC
(Utilities)
Github: https://github.com/adithya-s-sekhar/advanced-youtube-client-ayc
Opencode: https://www.opencode.net/adithyassekhar/advanced-youtube-client-ayc (This is a WIP importing from Github)
Test out latest featues and bug fixes before everyone: Test builds available on telegram https://t.me/s/ayc_news

Advanced Youtube Client - AYC v4.18 - 03/Nov/2023

What's new?
[4.18]
- Fixed: Shortcuts weren't being made or broken when AYC is in a path with spaces.
- Fixed: Reset in folder settings were resetting to an old path.
- Added: Custom quality selectors for youtube downloads.
- Code cleanups.
- UI Fixes.

AYC is a highly responsive, no nonsense, easy to use, fast video downloader from the text based era.

Features
- Supports Youtube, Reddit, Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, Twitch, Dailymotion, Vimeo and 100s of other websites that yt-dlp supports.
- Automatically saves video chapters, thumbnails, subtitles (User configurable).
- Supports downloading playlists, channels, keyword topics on multiple websites.
- Multithreaded downloads using aria2c to fully utilize the available bandwidth (User configurable).
- Batch mode can create jobs, save urls to them and download, resume, edit, delete.
- Extremely light and instantly responding text based ui.
- Easily editable batch script.
- Compatible with Windows 7 SP1/8/8.1/10/11 (32/64-bit).
- Downloads only. Does not convert to other formats. All formats are given by the website.
- Except for audio. Along with untouched M4A and OPUS audio straight from youtube, there is also a 128k CBR MP3 option.
- Everything is designed to help create muscle memory.

Installation
Note: Windows Defender will show a one-time warning before you try to start a batch file downloaded from the internet. You need to click More info and click Run Anyway for it to go away.

1. Download the latest AYC release from here.
2. Extract the ayc folder inside to anywhere on your computer (eg: C:\ayc). Do not extract inside Program Files.
3. Open AYClient.bat and follow the on screen instructions.

When you're done there'll be a shortcut created in ayc folder, on the desktop and in start menu. Open it to start using AYC.
[read more]

item.title: How to Recover Files Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: How to Recover Files Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
How to Recover Files Mac
(Utilities)
Highly innovative digital camera data recovery application for Mac operating system effectively retrieves overall fortuitously formatted data of each major kind of image extensions such as jpg, wmf, emf, gif, jpg, avi, midi and jpeg etc. Apple Macintosh OS X based data recovery software smoothly salvages absent files from some incidents such as accidental deletion, improper device handling, bad sector in disk, battery failure, software or hardware malfunctioning, formatted/reformatted memory cards, logical errors in memory cards of digital camera, unexpectedly virus or worm infection etc. Resourceful data retrieval utility for Apple Macintosh operating system brings back missing data through various chief manufacturer companies of digital cameras for example Konica, LG Electronics, Canon, Fuji-Film, Casio, HP, Kodak, Nikon, Olympus, Samsung, Sony and many more. Creative digital camera data revival application for Apple Mac operating system salvages misplaced data from different kinds of digital camera like novelty camera, point/shoot camera, professional camera, bridge camera, prosumer digital camera, digital video camera, speciality camera and other types of digital camera. Features:-* Innovative digital camera data recovery utility for Mac supports friendly graphical user interface consequently supportive for learner users to effortlessly work on the data revival tool.* Simple to use how to recover files application for Apple Macintosh OS X provides unique feature of previewing facility of intended file for user before than the actual data retrieval.* Elegant digital camera recovery software for Apple Macintosh operating system does not demand any added hardware or software installation for salvaging vanished data.* Consistent Macintosh OS based data revival program utilizes different advanced or standard searching algorithms to bring back images, video files and other vital recorded clippings.

[read more]

[read more]

How to Recover Files Mac
(Utilities)
Highly innovative digital camera data recovery application for Mac operating system effectively retrieves overall fortuitously formatted data of each major kind of image extensions such as jpg, wmf, emf, gif, jpg, avi, midi and jpeg etc. Apple Macintosh OS X based data recovery software smoothly salvages absent files from some incidents such as accidental deletion, improper device handling, bad sector in disk, battery failure, software or hardware malfunctioning, formatted/reformatted memory cards, logical errors in memory cards of digital camera, unexpectedly virus or worm infection etc. Resourceful data retrieval utility for Apple Macintosh operating system brings back missing data through various chief manufacturer companies of digital cameras for example Konica, LG Electronics, Canon, Fuji-Film, Casio, HP, Kodak, Nikon, Olympus, Samsung, Sony and many more. Creative digital camera data revival application for Apple Mac operating system salvages misplaced data from different kinds of digital camera like novelty camera, point/shoot camera, professional camera, bridge camera, prosumer digital camera, digital video camera, speciality camera and other types of digital camera. Features:-* Innovative digital camera data recovery utility for Mac supports friendly graphical user interface consequently supportive for learner users to effortlessly work on the data revival tool.* Simple to use how to recover files application for Apple Macintosh OS X provides unique feature of previewing facility of intended file for user before than the actual data retrieval.* Elegant digital camera recovery software for Apple Macintosh operating system does not demand any added hardware or software installation for salvaging vanished data.* Consistent Macintosh OS based data revival program utilizes different advanced or standard searching algorithms to bring back images, video files and other vital recorded clippings.

[read more]

item.title: Speed Dreams [Racing]
item.itunes:title: Speed Dreams [Racing]
item.itunes:author: leillo1975
item.itunes:summary:
Speed Dreams
(Racing)
Speed Dreams is a Motorsport Simulator featuring high-quality 3D graphics and an accurate physics engine, all targeting maximum realism. Initially forked from TORCS, it has now reached a clearly higher realism level in visual and physics simulation, thanks to its active development team and growing community. It mainly aims to implement exciting new features, cars, tracks and AI opponents to make a more enjoyable game for the player, while constantly pushing forward visual and physics realism. It is also intended for any research, study or teaching activity, around physics and AI, thanks to its GPL V2+ license, and the clear and modular architecture of its C/C++ code base:
https://www.speed-dreams.net

[read more]
item.description:
Speed Dreams
(Racing)
Speed Dreams is a Motorsport Simulator featuring high-quality 3D graphics and an accurate physics engine, all targeting maximum realism. Initially forked from TORCS, it has now reached a clearly higher realism level in visual and physics simulation, thanks to its active development team and growing community. It mainly aims to implement exciting new features, cars, tracks and AI opponents to make a more enjoyable game for the player, while constantly pushing forward visual and physics realism. It is also intended for any research, study or teaching activity, around physics and AI, thanks to its GPL V2+ license, and the clear and modular architecture of its C/C++ code base:
https://www.speed-dreams.net

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Speed Dreams
(Racing)
Speed Dreams is a Motorsport Simulator featuring high-quality 3D graphics and an accurate physics engine, all targeting maximum realism. Initially forked from TORCS, it has now reached a clearly higher realism level in visual and physics simulation, thanks to its active development team and growing community. It mainly aims to implement exciting new features, cars, tracks and AI opponents to make a more enjoyable game for the player, while constantly pushing forward visual and physics realism. It is also intended for any research, study or teaching activity, around physics and AI, thanks to its GPL V2+ license, and the clear and modular architecture of its C/C++ code base:
https://www.speed-dreams.net

item.title: Digital Camera Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Camera Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Camera Recovery
(Utilities)
Visit website www.digitalcamerarecovery.org to download cost effective and professional Digital Camera Recovery application recovers lost or deleted memorable audio-video clipping, wedding album, photographs and other digital data from formatted or virus infected digital camera within short time period. Digital camera video restoration tool provides facility to scan entire digital camera using disk scanning feature that easily recovers lost enhance digicam data in any file format without any expert guidance in affordable and fastest way.

[read more]
item.description:
Digital Camera Recovery
(Utilities)
Visit website www.digitalcamerarecovery.org to download cost effective and professional Digital Camera Recovery application recovers lost or deleted memorable audio-video clipping, wedding album, photographs and other digital data from formatted or virus infected digital camera within short time period. Digital camera video restoration tool provides facility to scan entire digital camera using disk scanning feature that easily recovers lost enhance digicam data in any file format without any expert guidance in affordable and fastest way.

[read more]

Digital camera video restoration tool provides facility to scan entire digital camera using disk scanning feature that easily recovers lost enhance digicam data in any file format without any expert guidance in affordable and fastest way.
